name: OpenClaw v2026.2.17
description: Open-source local-first AI agent platform for coding and task automation. Features workspace memory system, multi-platform support (macOS/Windows/Linux/mobile), and integrates with chat platforms. Version 2026.2.17 added Sonnet 4.6, 1M context testing, sub-agent generation from chats, and iOS share extensions. Achieved 196,000+ GitHub stars by late February 2026.
community_quotes: Phenomenal open-source success in the AI agent space
Over 196,000 GitHub stars by late February 2026
Local-first architecture ensures data privacy - no cloud uploads
Over 300 derivative projects have emerged on GitHub
